options.name: -all
options.description: Split all MBFF instances to SBFF instances. Default is false.

options.name: -force
options.description: Force to split the flip-flop regardless timing gains. Default is false.

options.name: -fullSplit
options.description: set -fullSplit to completely split to single bits.

options.name: -inst
options.description: <flopInstName | {{Mbff1 flopCell1} {Mbff2 flopCell2}...}> The names of the flop instance to be splitted. When the input is a string of MBFF/Cell pairs list, it will split the MBFF to the specified cell without evaluation (supported for full split only).

options.name: -legal
options.description: To place the split flip-flop at legal location. Default is false.

options.name: -listFile
options.description: The file containing names of MBFF instances to split. Specify one instance on one line. Comment with #. Instance name should not contain spaces or backslashes. When specifying one instance and one cell on one line, it will split the MBFF to the specified cell without evaluation (supported for full split only).

options.name: -postCTS
options.description: Set -postCTS if design stage is postCTS.

options.name: -postRoute
options.description: Set -postRoute if design stage is postRoute.

options.name: -power
options.description: Split the flip-flop for power purpose. Default is false.

options.name: -preCTS
options.description: Set -preCTS if design stage is preCTS.

options.name: -skipRoute
options.description: set -skipRoute if stage is postRoute and globalDetailRoute is not necessary after split.
